delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
welcome_desc: I'm your marketing assistant. I can help you create sales scripts, ad creative, product copywriting and more. Tell me what you need.
input_placeholder: Enter ideas, scripts or upload references, use @ to mention media files...
first_last_frame_desc: First image as start frame, second as end frame (optional)
resolution_auto_desc: Auto-select best resolution based on model
first_last_frame_mode_desc: First image as start frame, second as end frame
feedback_desc: Scan the QR code to join our WeChat feedback group for instant support and updates.
current_power: Current power balance (click to view logs)
wechat_pay_tip: Open WeChat to scan and pay
auto_arrival_tip: If already paid, the system will auto-credit shortly
image_generation_failed: Image generation failed. Please try again later.
video_generation_failed: Video generation failed. Please try again later.
request_error: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.
verification_timeout: Response timeout. Please resend your message.
request_timeout: Request timeout, please try again later
task_restore_failed: Task status restore failed. Please regenerate.
default_chat_text: Help me create a product video script
local_recharge_hint: QR code payment is only available in cloud environment. In local mode, admins can add power in the admin panel.
upload_failed_delete: Image upload failed. Please delete failed images and re-upload.
upload_timeout_retry: Image upload timeout. Please try again later.
upload_not_ready: Image upload not complete. Please try again later.
insufficient_power: Insufficient power. Please recharge to continue.
keep_one_session: Keep at least one chat session
